texto: The compound feelings have vanished, the mixture of colors in an art shop, sixteen shades of eggshell. Yellow and blue make green. Friendship? Jealousy? Tenderness? Consideration, sympathy. Happiness. I miss happiness the most, the mixture of everything, of all the negative emotions, a drop of surprise and a bit of joy. Happiness is the perfect blend, but no one knows the recipe.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Malin Persson Giolito que provoca temas ligados a amizade. Ao questionar “The compound feelings have vanished, the mixture of colors in an art shop, sixteen shades of eggs…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amizade, happiness, reflexao, com foco em termino e reflexao.
